completeness.notes: Zero iso8601 decoders remain in production code. All CancellationError hot paths covered. All HIGH and MEDIUM accessibility gaps fixed. Only remaining items are test files (intentional) and baseball pack architecture (out of scope for polish).

quality.notes: All changes follow CLAUDE.md patterns exactly. flexibleDecoder used consistently. keyDecodingStrategy preserved where needed. No regressions. CancellationError uses existing error.isCancellation extension.

compliance.notes: Build succeeds, lint clean, zero warnings. TestFlight uploaded for both builds. All enforcement checks pass. Accessibility improved, not degraded.

efficiency.notes: 6 parallel agents for Build 616 maximized throughput. 4 audit agents ran in parallel for discovery. Total swarm execution across both builds ~40 minutes for 87 files.

reusability.notes: Swarm plan v2 is a reusable template for systematic codebase-wide replacements. Audit agent pattern works for any category of technical debt. Backlog generated with prioritized items.
